title: Extra Generators
description: A technology mod that adds a variety of generators to your world.
body: # Extra Generators A technology mod that adds a variety of generators to your world. Also uses [Energy](https://github.com/TechReborn/Energy) by [TechReborn](https://github.com/TechReborn) ## Regular Generators This mod adds a total of 16 regular energy generators in 5 different tiers, each one with custom item and fluids requirements so that you can have multiple options to choose from when powering your base. ## Infinite Generators This mod adds 2 infinite generators that will provide you with an absurd amount of energy. But in order to power it, you'll need to power all regular generators at the same time. ## Energy Compatibility All generators are fully compatible with popular Fabric mods like Industrial Revolution and Tech Reborn ## REI Integration All generators have full integration with [RoughlyEnoughItems](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roughly-enough-items) so you can see all their recipes and energy generation requirements. REI usage is strongly advised since there is no wiki or guidebook. ## Other information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: [https://github.com/lucaargolo/extra-generators](https://github.com/lucaargolo/extra-generators) If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to call me on Discord @D4rk#0693 You can find me in the Cafeteria Development guild. [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/707435077679841350/embed.png?style=banner2&v=2)](https://discord.com/invite/G4PjhEf)
